items.title: uideazone Mens Short Sleeve T-Shirt Casual 3D Creative Print Crewneck Graphic Tees
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: uideazone, mens, casual, creative, print, crewneck, tees. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
